title: The Dance Floor Is Changing. Are You?
description: Live-voted DJ battles, a “shrinking” metaverse, Apple’s streaming tweaks, and why I’m testing new DJ software. Plus: A masterclass in crowd psychology.
author: The Future DJ

title: Everything Is AI Now. Even Deadmau5.
description: Deadmau5 gets digitally cloned, Apple builds wearable AI, VirtualDJ pushes innovation, and The Banger Button is almost here.
author: The Future DJ

title: The Music Industry Is Speedrunning the Future
description: Native Instruments files paperwork, YouTube quietly admits music owns the platform, AI gets its own charts (of course), Meta launches yet another app, and will.i.am calmly explains why none of this should surprise you.
author: The Future DJ

title: RANE Just Changed the Booth (System One Is Official)
description: RANE drops System One, Spotify wants another dollar, Apple bundles creator tools, an AI judges your DJ sets with zero mercy — and tonight Aaron’s giving away crates, metadata, and probably a few hard truths at the hackathon
author: The Future DJ

title: The Booth Is Evolving (Even When Verizon Isn’t)
description: Apple Music hits the CDJ, Google gives Siri a brain, DMC crowns a VR champ, Bandcamp bans the bots, and DJs reorganize their crates.....all while Verizon reminded us that even in the future, you can still lose the internet mid-set.
author: The Future DJ

title: New Gear, New Trends, and the End of DJ Isolation?
description: RANE may have “accidentally” leaked a new standalone, Spotify wants your friends in your headphones, WeddingPro reveals what actually works in 2026, and Epidemic Sound says pluggnB is officially a thing. Buckle up, Future DJ.
author: The Future DJ

title: The 2025 DJ Rewind: The Year Tech Tried to Out‐DJ Us
description: AI wrote songs, Spotify dropped videos, Gaga said “not today, robot,” and DJs still can’t find that one track they swear they downloaded. Let’s wrap up 2025 with one final banger.
author: The Future DJ

title: DJ Tools, Social Media Trends & Wedding Floor Gold
description: Inside This Week: Spotify’s new DJ integration, djay app’s big move, the top teen apps reshaping music habits, lightning-fast playlist building—and a Hackathon packed with wedding crate cheat codes that skip the “Top 200” trap.
author: The Future DJ

title: The Decks Just Got Smarter
description: From Google’s second attempt at DJ-ready glasses to VirtualDJ’s glow-up and Serato’s surprise slab, plus a festive Crate Hackathon with Mike Walter and the 2026 social trends you’ll actually care about.
author: The Future DJ

title: Not Your Average DJ Tools Roundup
description: From AI collabs to sample slicing, the future of music creation just leveled up.This week: Spotify buys WhoSampled, Warner taps Suno for licensed AI tracks, Ableton 12.3 slices cleaner, and Ray-Ban x Spotify throw a no-phone concert (yes, really). Plus, we teleport into Meta’s Horizon.
author: The Future DJ

title: Skip the Headphones—Black Friday for DJs Who Mean Business
description: This isn’t your average gift guide. No iPads, no speaker deals—just the game-changing software, tools, and tech every working DJ should grab before the sales disappear. Welcome to The Future DJ - Black Friday Edition
author: The Future DJ

title: DJ Intelligence: From Napster’s Comeback to AI Crate Hacks
description: The lines between old-school and next-gen are blurring—fast. Napster launches an AI assistant, Siri gets a Gemini glow-up, Meta revamps ads, and Aaron drops 12 AI prompts every DJ needs. Plus, our Remix Hackathon hits tonight—are you in?
author: The Future DJ

title: Pioneer Hits Pause, Sora Hits Android, Instagram Starts Snitching
description: Tech drama, AI expansion, and a Hip-Hop Hackathon to reset your weekend energy.
author: The Future DJ

title: The Algorithms Are Listening (And They’re Finally Getting It Right)
description: Spotify’s new ChatGPT integration, TikTok’s AI auto-edit tools, and Adobe’s Project Moonlight all want to help you post smarter, faster, and with less brain drain. Plus: Aaron Strawn joins Hackathon to show how he spices up his wedding performance
author: The Future DJ

title: DJ Software Rivals Just Teamed Up — OneLibrary Could Change Everything
description: Traktor goes beginner-friendly, OpenAI builds a browser to think for you, OneLibrary wants to unify your music universe, and Aaron Traylor DJed Tokyo with smartglasses like he was in Black Mirror. Plus: Rate My Crate night hits Hackathon — are your playlists ready?
author: The Future DJ

title: From Sora to Swift: The Week AI Took the Aux Cord
description: AI can make your playlists smarter, your videos cinematic, and maybe your competition obsolete. We’ll break down what’s next for Spotify, Meta, and the music-tech world — then join us live for Nick Nystrom’s Hackathon tonight to level up your Instagram.
author: The Future DJ

title: Breaking (Last Week’s) News: Spotify Finally Hits DJ Software
description: Okay, we know—you probably saw this before we hit send. But we’ve got the full breakdown on what Spotify in your DJ software really means, plus playlist-building hacks, the evolution of DJing, Adobe Premiere on iPhone, and details on our Halloween Music Hackathon.
author: The Future DJ

title: A Robot, An Avatar & A DJ Walk Into A Club...

description: Streaming shifts, software upgrades, ad power plays, and a wedding-music masterclass with Big Daddy.

title: Streams, Specs & Smart Crates
description: From The Weeknd breaking records to Meta breaking into your face (literally), here’s what matters: Apple Music’s new playlist tool, IG growth tips, and Aaron’s no-BS Serato workflow. Also tune in to DJ Dynamix tonight on Twitch!

title: MKII Madness: Rane One Levels Up (Sort Of)
description: From fresh turntables to retention charts, here’s the gear, tech, and trends DJs need to know right now.

title: No DJX Break Here – GPT-5, Virtual DJ, ABBA & Grok Take Center Stage
description: While half the DJ world is sipping cocktails in Atlantic City, we’re serving you the latest: GPT-5 for creators, Ed Carey’s deep dive on Virtual DJ, ABBA’s billion-stream disco magic, and Grok 4 going free. Plus—don’t miss tonight’s free ChatGPT training webinar.

title: The DJ Software Arms Race Heats Up
description: Serato might be playing catch-up, but djay Pro isn’t slowing down. Plus: new rules for going live on IG, Elevenlabs AI Music Generator and Skratch Bastid joins our Hackathon to cut through your Hip-Hop set.

title: Back From the Future: Grown DJs, Metaverse Beats & TikTok Retreats
description: This week, we’re tracking the TikTok Live exodus, Spotify’s move into the VR partyverse, and the rise of the seasoned selector. Plus: Dangerous DJs is officially open, and Warren Peace joins us live tonight to drop hackathon heat.

title: Vertical Feeds. Horizontal Thinking. And One Very Talkative DAW
description: Back from neon-fueled Nashville, we’re diving straight into the chaos: FL Studio’s new AI assistant, Twitch’s TikTok envy, and Instagram’s latest “innovation”: more like buttons.

title: Prime Deals, Cheat Codes & AI Miracles
description: Amazon is trying to empty your wallet, Nick Spinelli handled a playlist like a G, and Deville will get your Top 40 game on lock. Oh, and Google’s AI might cure all diseases, but can it fix your disorganized crates? Plus, some TikTok news you won't want to miss

description: This week with The Future DJ: How smart tech, smarter content, and corporate strategy are reshaping the DJ game. Plus: Tonight's hackathon is Must See Twitch TV.

title: Dance Music is Having a Moment
description: From AI tracks topping TikTok to dance music’s cultural glow-up (even if no one’s dancing), this week we’re diving into the tech, trends, and tactics every forward-thinking DJ needs. Plus: don’t miss tonight’s Multicultural Crate Hackathon — because “Suavemente” isn’t a personality.

title: Future Proof Your DJ Business
description: Spotify’s AI Lab, Apple’s AR Glasses, and 5 Mistakes DJs Still Make on Social — It’s Time to Upgrade Your Game

title: Apple Music Just Told You What’s Hot — Are You Listening?
description: This week: new viral charts for DJs to stalk, Spotify’s AI DJ tries to read your mind, L-Acoustics drops a 360° flex, and Aaron Traylor shows how to keep it clean (literally) with your next client’s playlist.
author: The Future DJ

title: Nobody’s Dancing, But Everyone’s Watching
description: From decoding the new club vibe to exploring DJ-friendly metaverse venues and surviving social media pressure, this week we’re unpacking what it really means to perform in 2025 — algorithms, avatars, and all.

title: New Tools, New Tricks: Instagram Edits App (And Other Things DJs Should Actually Care About)
description: From editing on the fly with Instagram’s new app, to smarter AI assistants, Star Wars daydreams in Fortnite, Evermix upgrades, and even a deep undercover country DJ mission — we’re covering the new moves you need to know this week.

title: Book More, Design Better, Go Viral: DJ Upgrades You Didn’t Know You Needed
description: This week, we dove into Canva’s new AI-powered upgrades, The Knot’s deep-dive wedding report, and why YouTube Shorts might be your best unpaid hype man. Whether you’re designing, gigging, or going viral—this one’s stacked.
author: The Future DJ

title: Take Control of Your Playlists with algRTHM (Finally, Some Order in the Chaos)
description: This week, we’re diving into algRTHM’s playlist-tracking magic, Udio’s audio-style-generating sorcery, and Djay Pro’s new groove-friendly update for the GRV6. Whether you’re automating your prep or upgrading your gear, it’s all about working smarter—not just louder.
author: The Future DJ

title: Serato Got Bought (Again) + New Tools to Sharpen Your DJ Game
description: This week we’re breaking down Serato’s surprise sale (again), Mixed In Key’s new mashup-ready Pro tools, and how DJs and creators alike are using ChatGPT to save time and spark ideas. Smarter workflows, tighter sets—let’s get into it.
author: The Future DJ

title: Mashups, AI DJ Assistants & Siri’s Worst Nightmare
description: This week, we’re diving into MashApp, the new tool letting fans legally create remixes, Google Gemini’s iOS widgets (and why Siri should be nervous), and how AI is making DJing easier—from reading gear manuals to curating the perfect playlist. Plus, the real cost of digital DJing—is your setup breaking the bank? Let’s get into it!
author: The Future DJ

title: Tech, Tunes & DJ Truth Bombs – This Week’s Must-Reads
description: From a robot DJ making club debuts (don’t worry, your gigs are safe) to DJ.Studio’s new mashup mode and Spotify’s long-awaited HiFi launch, we’re diving into the hottest updates in music and DJ tech. Plus, we break down the real costs of going digital—because your wallet deserves the truth.
author: The Future DJ

title: The Top 10 DJs To Look For In 2025
description: From Google Gemini's attempted takeover to YouTube’s AI video revolution, this week we’re covering the major shifts in music discovery, content creation, and DJ culture. Find out how DJs can transition to YouTube, explore the top DJs to watch in 2025, and dive into the latest AI trends shaping the industry. Stay ahead of the game—let’s go!
author: The Future DJ

title: The Future is Now: AI, Music, and the Platforms Shaping 2025
description: From The Beatles winning the first AI-assisted Grammy to OmniHuman-1 creating lifelike digital clones, this week’s newsletter dives into how AI is shaking up music, content creation, and the DJ industry. Plus, TikTok’s latest marketing calendar and Instagram’s algorithm updates—because staying ahead of the game is mandatory. Let’s get into it!
author: The Future DJ

title: Your 2025 DJ Toolkit: Game Changing Strategies and Updates
description: We may be the only people not talking about speaker size but we are here. From music trends to the latest portable gear and Instagram algorithm hacks, this week’s edition is all about helping you stay ahead, work smarter, and elevate your DJ game. Let’s dive in!
author: The Future DJ

title: TikTok Turmoil: The Social Media Shakeup DJs Need To Know
description: From TikTok’s looming ban to the rise of YouTube Shorts and Triller’s latest tool, this edition is packed with the updates and strategies you need to stay ahead in the ever-changing social media game. Let’s dive in before the algorithm changes again!

title: Happy New Year From The Future DJ
description: In this edition, we’re kicking off the year with insights into VR music production, the latest social media tools, and a deep dive into the budget-friendly DDJ-FLX2 controller. Let’s start the year with innovation and creativity!
author: The Future DJ

title: What's Next For 2025?
description: As 2024 comes to a close, we’re diving into the biggest stories shaping the music and creator landscape: AI’s impact on music, the best tools for social media, predictions for 2025, and more. Let’s end the year on a high note!

title: VirtualDJ 2025, TikTok’s Future, and Amazon’s AI Gamble
description: From VirtualDJ’s powerful new features to the TikTok ban drama heating up and Amazon’s late arrival to the AI scene with Nova, we’ve got the stories you need to stay ahead of the curve. Plus, our top DJ software picks for 2024!

title: Black Friday Finds: Tools for DJs and Creatives
description: This isn’t your typical list of random Amazon deals. We’ve handpicked Black Friday offers tailored for DJs, music producers, and tech enthusiasts—helpful tools that fit your creative workflow, not just your shopping cart.
author: The Future DJ

title: This Week in Tech: AI Upgrades, Smarter Apple Devices, and New DJ Gear
description: From OpenAI’s enhanced ChatGPT search capabilities to Apple’s Intelligence update across iPhone, iPad, and Mac, and Native Instruments’ Traktor Z1 MK2—discover how the latest tech is set to transform your workflow and DJ setup.

title: From TikTok Trends to DJ Gear Decisions: This Week’s Music Industry Buzz
